entry.title: At AI Summit, South Korea Outlines Its AI Future With NVIDIA and Partners
entry.summary: At this week’s AI Summit in San Francisco, South Korean President Jae Myung Lee and some of the country’s top business leaders and researchers are meeting with NVIDIA and ecosystem partners to chart Korea’s AI progress.

entry.title: GeForce NOW Sets Sail With ‘Path of Exile: Curse of the Allflame’ Joining the Cloud
entry.summary: Plus, ‘Battlefield 6’ updates, Capcom classics, ‘Halo: Campaign Evolved Advanced Access’ and nine new games arrive on the cloud this week.

entry.title: NVIDIA AI Supercomputer Comes Online at Naval Postgraduate School
entry.summary: NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang joined school leadership in Monterey, California, to commission the system, which will fuel AI education and research at the US military’s premier technical graduate university.

entry.title: Built in Fort Worth: Wistron Opens Advanced Manufacturing Plant to Produce NVIDIA AI Systems
entry.summary: The AI era runs on AI infrastructure. Many of these advanced systems are built and tested in Texas. Wistron opened its first U.S. manufacturing facility today in Fort Worth — a 324,000-square-foot greenfield plant producing superchips at the heart of some of the world’s most capable AI systems. In front of an audience of Wistron […]

entry.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Driving Performance Per Watt, Lowest Token Cost for Partners Worldwide
entry.summary: Backed by 300 global partners, Vera Rubin is ramping up worldwide. NVIDIA partners CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure and Mistral are among many deploying Vera Rubin, which delivers benchmark leadership on performance per watt and lowest token costs.

entry.title: Japan’s Robotics and Manufacturing Leaders Build on NVIDIA Cosmos to Advance Physical AI Frontier
entry.summary: NVIDIA today announced that Japan’s physical AI leaders are building on the NVIDIA Cosmos™, NVIDIA Isaac™, NVIDIA Metropolis and NVIDIA Jetson™ platforms to accelerate the deployment of intelligent machines across manufacturing, mobility, infrastructure and robotics.

entry.title: NVIDIA and KAIST Launch Joint AI Research Lab to Accelerate AI Innovation in Korea
entry.summary: NVIDIA and the Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST) today announced the launch of a joint AI research laboratory at the KAIST Kim Jaechul Graduate School of AI in Seoul, dedicated to advancing agentic AI for South Korea.

entry.title: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit Expands With New Omniverse Libraries, Putting AI Agents to Work Building Simulation-Ready Worlds
entry.summary: NVIDIA today announced that NVIDIA Agent Toolkit now includes NVIDIA Omniverse™ libraries — a collection of software components that give AI agents tools and skills to add physical AI capabilities to existing applications and prepare 3D content for simulation.

entry.title: Gaming Archives
entry.summary: Lock in and load up the cloud. GFN Thursday brings fresh updates and new adventures, all ready to play without waiting for downloads. Set sail...
